rationale: Hard pass for production: this archetype leans on licensed Dragon Ball Z IP (Goku, Super Saiyan 3, "Dragon Fist") which is a legal non-starter and also misrepresents Mob Control's gameplay — there's no 1v1 anime brawler loop, no aiming/multiplier/mob-growth payoff in the hook. Palette (yellow/orange/black) clashes with the royal purple + cyan brand system, and while the male 18-35 anime-fan audience does overlap demographically, the bait-and-switch risk tanks IPM and post-install retention. Only borrow the abstract takeaway — a loud, high-energy "power-up and charge" beat — and rebuild it natively around a giant mob bursting through a x10 gate.
